message:
fix: multiple P1 bug fixes — race condition, mutex timeouts, dry-run flag, dot-dir filter, test fixes

- Fix restartWithBackoff race condition: add restarting flag to prevent concurrent
  restarts when mutex is unlocked during backoff sleep (gt-r90f8e)
- Add context timeouts to all external commands in DoltServerManager to prevent
  indefinite mutex blocking; run escalation mail async (gt-ax9a3d)
- Fix polecat stale --dry-run: register dedicated flag on polecatStaleCmd instead of
  incorrectly reading polecatNukeDryRun from nuke command (gt-qux9a)
- Add dot-prefix filter to crew List() matching polecat scan pattern (gt-b9dnd)
- Fix formula cycle detection example test output mismatch (gt-6d9kb)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
